async_fs_webserver_create.message0: Create ESP32 file system web server %1 file system %2 port %3 hostname %4
async_fs_webserver_create.tooltip: Create AsyncFsWebServer global object and register variables, dedicated to ESP32

async_fs_webserver_mount_fs.message0: %1 Mount file system %2 Automatically format on failure %3
async_fs_webserver_mount_fs.tooltip: Mount the ESP32 file system in setup. It can automatically format and restart if it fails.

async_fs_webserver_connect_or_ap.message0: %1 Connection to saved WiFi timeout %2 milliseconds Turn on AP if failed %3 Password %4 Jump %5
async_fs_webserver_connect_or_ap.tooltip: First connect to WiFi with saved credentials, then start configuring hotspot and captive portal after failure

async_fs_webserver_start_wifi.tooltip: Use WiFi credentials saved in the file system to connect to the network and wait for the specified timeout before returning.

async_fs_webserver_captive_portal.tooltip: Start the ESP32 hotspot and captive portal, usually jump to the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_start_server.tooltip: Register the built-in processor and start the web server

async_fs_webserver_start_ws_server.message0: Start the %1 web server and enable the /ws event
async_fs_webserver_start_ws_server.tooltip: Start the server and register WebSocket event callbacks at the default /ws path

async_fs_webserver_file_editor.tooltip: Enables built-in ACE file browsing, uploading, editing and deleting pages

async_fs_webserver_set_auth.tooltip: Set the Basic Auth account and password for the /setup management page

async_fs_webserver_require_auth.tooltip: After opening, all pages require Basic Auth authentication.

async_fs_webserver_page_title.tooltip: The title displayed in the setup/setup configuration page

async_fs_webserver_firmware_version.tooltip: The current firmware version displayed on the setup/setup page

async_fs_webserver_option_box.tooltip: Add an application configuration options group to the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_option_text.message0: %1 Add text option tag %2 Default value %3
async_fs_webserver_option_text.tooltip: Add text configuration items on the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_option_number.message0: %1 Add numeric option Tag %2 Default %3 Minimum %4 Maximum %5 Step %6
async_fs_webserver_option_number.tooltip: Add numerical configuration items with range and step on the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_option_bool.message0: %1 Add switch option label %2 Default checked %3
async_fs_webserver_option_bool.tooltip: Add Boolean switch configuration items on the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_option_comment.tooltip: Add help instructions to the specified configuration items in the /setup page

async_fs_webserver_route.tooltip: Add custom HTTP route processing function to ESPAsyncWebServer

async_fs_webserver_response.message0: Response request status code %1 type %2 content %3
async_fs_webserver_response.tooltip: Sending response inside HTTP route processing block

async_fs_webserver_response_ok.tooltip: Send default OK response inside HTTP route processing block

async_fs_webserver_request_arg.tooltip: Reading request parameters inside HTTP routing processing block

async_fs_webserver_request_has_arg.tooltip: Determine whether the request contains specified parameters inside the HTTP routing processing block

async_fs_webserver_request_path.tooltip: Get the current request URL path inside the HTTP routing processing block

async_fs_webserver_ws_broadcast.tooltip: Broadcast text message to all connected WebSocket clients

async_fs_webserver_ws_reply.tooltip: Send text message to current client inside WebSocket event block

async_fs_webserver_ws_event_is.tooltip: Determine the current event type inside the WebSocket event block

async_fs_webserver_ws_message.tooltip: Get text message in WebSocket received data event

async_fs_webserver_ws_client_id.tooltip: Get current client ID inside WebSocket event block

async_fs_webserver_server_ip.tooltip: Get the current web server IP address string

async_fs_webserver_is_ap_mode.tooltip: Determine whether the server is currently running in hotspot AP mode

async_fs_webserver_start_mdns.tooltip: Start mDNS responder when WiFi is connected to facilitate access via hostname.local

async_fs_webserver_clear_saved_settings.tooltip: Delete the /setup/config.json configuration file, the return value will be ignored

async_fs_webserver_settings_file_name.tooltip: Get the path where /setup saves the configuration file
